title: Crops 'n' Corpses
description: A tower-defense and farming expansion hybrid mod inspired by the classic game, Plants VS. Zombies!
body:
![banner :3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95b1324c98cff48455ed6ea6c493ed9fa15c2ef1.png)

-----

Provides new defense for the invading zombie horde with five plants from the classic mobile game, Plants VS. Zombies, or use them for your ever expanding agricultural empire… you monster…

Some plants can be found naturally throughout the world, or they can be crafted with new items traded by the Wandering Trader, or found in new structures. You can use the new Seed Packet item, also obtainable through the Wandering Trader, to grab previously tamed plants to take and place them wherever you want! However, you’ll need Sun to take them out of their packets! 

Sun is dropped by sun-producing plants… obviously! Sunflowers can be found in plains biomes and also be grown from vanilla sunflower plants. Only tamed Sunflowers will drop Sun for you. They will randomly overtime spit out Sun to fuel your floral fortress.

The Wandering Trader also sells Plant Food on occasion, and is an essential item to obtaining new plants, as its used to tame existing plants, and used in crafting recipes to create new plants. You’ll want to stock up on as much of this stuff as possible. Plant Food is also be used to heal damaged plants.

This mod also contains plenty of new food items, naturally found in the world, or crafted from existing foods and items. 

-----
